Do this right now 

Read the first 2 lines of your cold email

If it start with "we help" or "we provide"

Change it. That's a service description. Not an offer

→ What they GET
→ With a number
→ A timeframe
→ Reason to believe

Change it

Use Claude to help your turn your boring service into an offer that will work for cold email

cloning formats is becoming the default way people win short form

not because it’s “cheating”

because it removes the slowest part of content

deciding what to make
